assertions.title: Empty state when no dealer selected

steps.expected: Dealer selector in unselected state, empty state message visible
steps.observed: Page loaded with dealer selector showing 'Select dealer...' placeholder, heading 'Select a dealer', and descriptive text 'Choose a dealer from the dropdown above to view their financial data including ledger entries, invoices, and aging analysis.'

steps.expected: Empty state message with no data tabs or stat cards
steps.observed: Empty state displayed correctly — no tabs, no stat cards, only empty state message and dealer selector

steps.expected: Dropdown opens with dealers loaded from API
steps.observed: Dropdown opened showing 2 dealers: 'Mock GST Dealer GST-DEALER' and 'Validation Dealer VALID-DEALER'

steps.action: Type 'Valid' in search field to filter
steps.observed: Only 'Validation Dealer VALID-DEALER' shown after typing 'Valid' — Mock GST Dealer filtered out

steps.expected: Selector updates to show selected dealer, data loading begins
steps.observed: Selector updated to 'Validation Dealer VALID-DEALER', tabs appeared (Ledger0, Invoices1, Aging), Refresh button became enabled, stat cards loaded

steps.expected: Dealer selected, Ledger tab shows data
steps.observed: Dealer selected, Ledger tab shows 'Ledger11' (11 entries)

steps.expected: StatCards for Total Debit, Total Credit, Net Balance with values
steps.observed: Three StatCards displayed: Total Debit ₹8,407.50, Total Credit ₹0.00, Net Balance ₹8,407.50

steps.expected: DataTable with Date, Reference, Description, Debit, Credit, Balance columns
steps.observed: DataTable rendered with all 6 columns and 10 rows visible (paginated, showing 1-10 of 11). Rows contain dates, MOCK-SALE references, descriptions, debit amounts, credit placeholders (—), and running balance.

steps.expected: Dealer loads with Invoices tab showing 1 invoice
StatCards for Total Invoiced, Outstanding, Paid and DataTable with invoice data
steps.observed: Three StatCards: Total Invoiced ₹1,180.00, Outstanding ₹1,180.00, Paid 0 invoices. DataTable with columns: Invoice #, Issue Date, Due Date, Amount, Outstanding, Status. One row: VAL-MOCK-INV-001, 15 Jan 2026, 30 Jan 2026, ₹1,180.00, ₹1,180.00, Status badge 'ISSUED'.

steps.action: With GST-DEALER selected, click Aging tab
steps.expected: Total Outstanding card and aging buckets with progress bars
steps.observed: Total Outstanding card showing ₹8,407.50. Aging Breakdown with 5 buckets: Current (₹0.00, 0%), 1-30 days (₹8,407.50, 100%), 31-60 days (₹0.00, 0%), 61-90 days (₹0.00, 0%), 90+ days (₹0.00, 0%). Each bucket has a progress bar.

steps.expected: Green for current, red for overdue
steps.observed: Legend at bottom shows green 'Current (0-30 days)' and red 'Overdue (31+ days)'. Progress bars use corresponding colors.

frictions.description: Combobox dropdown click sometimes doesn't open on first click via agent-browser — used JS eval to programmatically click the dealer selector button as fallback
frictions.resolution: Used eval to find button by text content and click it, which reliably opens the dropdown

frictions.description: Network request tracking via agent-browser doesn't show historical requests — requests made before tracking was enabled are not captured
frictions.resolution: Verified API calls indirectly through the data displayed in the UI rather than captured network requests

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. Finance Support page correctly displays empty state when no dealer is selected, dealer selector loads from API with filtering, Ledger tab shows stat cards and data table with 11 entries, Invoices tab shows stat cards and invoice data with status badges, Aging tab shows total outstanding and color-coded bucket breakdown with progress bars.
